business_okrs.OKR_1: Maximize security posture and prevent unauthorized host execution
business_okrs.OKR_2: Minimize developer pipeline friction and stabilize dev environments across platforms
business_okrs.OKR_3: Optimize server scalability and decrease p99 request handling latency under concurrent load

technical_debt_map.title: Node Sandbox Escape (RCE)
technical_debt_map.resolution: Hardened global process object in sandbox thread bootstrap file.

technical_debt_map.title: Tracked cargo build target cache
technical_debt_map.resolution: Removed target/ directories from the git tracking index.

technical_debt_map.title: Blocking sync filesystem operations in file watcher
technical_debt_map.resolution: Refactored synchronous read/write/mkdir filesystem calls to async fs/promises.

technical_debt_map.title: Windows UAC Cargo Test execution failure
technical_debt_map.resolution: Excluded agentic-os-installer from workspace cargo test runs on Windows shells.

technical_debt_map.title: OmniRoute bridge latency flakiness
technical_debt_map.resolution: Adjusted assertion latency threshold from 5ms to 50ms.

technical_debt_map.title: Latent tags map crash on SQLite
technical_debt_map.resolution: Hardened tags parsing logic to handle both JSON text strings and string arrays dynamically.
